message:
🐛 Ensure emoji prefix on all Copilot PR titles

Copilot PRs were missing the emoji prefix required by Prow. The
automation only added emojis when stripping [WIP] from titles.

Now it always checks for an emoji prefix and adds one based on
labels/title keywords:
- ✨ for features/enhancements
- 🌱 for refactors/improvements
- 📖 for docs
- 🐛 for everything else (bug fix default)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
